violations.text: Ambient temperature of bar glass cold hold observed at 52 degrees Fahrenheit. Lemonade observed with a temperature of 52 degrees F. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. Lemonade in this unit was voluntarily disposed of during inspection. Service call placed. TCS foods are not to be stored in this unit until it is serviced and maintaining a consistent temperature at/below 41 degrees F. New Violation. Correct By: 04/01/2026
The entrance door is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 04/08/2026

Prep unit #1 (cook/grill line) is not in good repair. It is not currently in use. Service call has been placed and is expected today. Equipment must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 04/03/2026

The chlorine sanitizer concentration for the sanitizing cycle of the dishwasher was 0 parts per million (ppm). Chlorine sanitizing solutions must be between 50-100 ppm. Service call placed. 3-bay sink was set up and is to be used until dishwasher is repaired and has proper sanitizing concentration. New Violation. Correct By: 03/25/2025
Spray bottles used for storing chemicals taken from bulk supplies were not marked with the common name of the chemical. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 03/25/2025

Working containers of dry ingredients are not labeled with the common name of the food. Working containers holding food or food ingredients that are removed from their original packages, such as flour, herbs, salt, sugar, and spices must be labeled with the common name of the food. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 03/25/2025

The cutting boards of the prep units are very scratched and scored. Cutting blocks and boards that are subject to scratching and scoring shall be resurfaced if they can no longer be effectively cleaned and sanitized, or discarded if they are not capable of being resurfaced. New Violation. Correct By: 04/08/2025

Doors to the outside, located at the front and side of the facility, are not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 01/15/2024
Leak observed at the kitchen 3-bay sink and the dishwasher. Bar handsink does not have a hat water faucet knob. Plumbing must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 01/15/2024

The sink used for food preparation is lacking a proper air gap. A direct connection must not exist between the sewage system and a drain originating from equipment in which food is placed. New Violation. Correct By: 01/15/2024
